title: Cogswellia lapidosa
taxonomy: Cogswellia lapidosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Cogswellia and is native to the southwestern United States. The plant is considered rare and is found in arid regions with rocky substrates. Cogswellia lapidosa has been listed as an endangered species due to habitat degradation and other human activities. The plant's classification is subject to ongoing research and study to better understand its place within the Brassicaceae family.
